title: NOAA Coral Reef Conservation
description: A NOAA source card about coral reefs, threats, monitoring, and restoration.
license: U.S. Government Work / item-level rights vary

pages.text: NOAA coral reef resources cover reef ecosystems, bleaching, ocean change, local stressors, monitoring, restoration, and conservation decisions.
Use this source for reading about biodiversity, climate impacts, evidence, and community responses in marine environments.
NOAA materials are generally U.S. government work, but resource collections may link to partners or offsite materials. Check item-level rights before mirroring linked resources.
